steps.t: The Lossoth craftsmen are in the Great Lodge in Sûri-kylä, west of Nef. Nef has asked you to speak with the Lossoth craftsmen to learn if they are abl…
Nef is in Sûri-kylä, east from the Great Lodge. You should return to Nef and tell him what you learned from Rauno.
Rauno is in Sûri-kylä, west from Nef in the Great Lodge of Sûri-kylä. Nef has asked you to return to Rauno and try to convince him to craft a new shie…
Rauno is in Sûri-kylä, north from where you collected the items he requested. You should bring the hard bones and worm scales to Rauno so he can compl…
Rauno is in Sûri-kylä. You should speak with Rauno to see if Nef's shield is ready.
Nef is in Sûri-kylä, east from Rauno. Rauno told you to take the shield he made to Nef and bid him leave Sûri-kylä.
